# blastshield_proxy (Resource)

Manages a Blastshield proxy.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "blastshield_proxy" "web_proxy" {
  name    = "web-proxy"
  domains = ["app.example.com"]
  groups  = [blastshield_group.web_servers.id]

  tags = {
    environment = "production"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `domains` (Set of String)
- `exit_agents` (Set of String)
- `groups` (Set of Number)
- `proxy_port` (Number)
- `tags` (Map of String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `system_tags` (Map of String)
